name: Dependency Surface Extractor
short_description: Parses build manifests (Gradle build.gradle.kts, SwiftPM Package.swift, package.json) across all modules to extract declared dependencies, then cross-references actual import statements extracted via tree-sitter to compute the declared-vs-used gap: unused declared deps and used-but-transitive deps per module.
tech_stack: dependency-analysis-gradle-plugin (autonomousapps, v2.x+, Apache 2.0) — bytecode-level declared-vs-used analysis for Kotlin/Android modules; provides projectHealth and fixDependencies tasks
gradle-dependency-analyze plugin — compile-scope declared vs used check, complementary to DAGP
tree-sitter (kotlin + swift grammars) — import statement extraction from source for cross-validation with manifest declarations
SwiftPM Package.resolved parser (custom Python) — parse JSON Package.resolved to extract pinned dependency versions and transitive closure
spmgraph (getyourguide, Nov 2025) — SPM dependency graph management, rule-based; used for cross-module SPM dependency assertions
swift-dependency-graph (Tim Searle, Dec 2025) — builds dependency graph across Xcode targets and SwiftPM packages, exports HTML/DOT
OWASP dependency-check Swift analyzer — CVE correlation on Swift packages (bonus security enrichment)
entity_model: Produces :Dependency nodes (group_id, artifact_id, version, ecosystem=[gradle|spm|npm], resolved_version) and :Module nodes (shared with Item 1). Edges: :DECLARES_DEP (module → dependency, config=[api|implementation|compileOnly|testImplementation|regular], is_used=bool, is_transitive_leak=bool). Also :IMPORTS_SYMBOL (module → dependency, symbol_name, import_path) for import-level cross-reference. Produces :DepFinding nodes (module, finding_type=[unused-declared|used-undeclared|wrong-config|version-mismatch], dependency, recommendation) for actionable advice. Applies structural facet structural=dependency-surface, domain-concept=dependency-hygiene. :DepHealthReport node (timestamp, total_modules, unused_count, transitive_leak_count) is an EpisodicNode summarising the state per ingest cycle.
storage_format: graph-node — :Dependency, :Module, :DECLARES_DEP, :DepFinding written to Graphiti. .knowledge/dep-surface.md supplementary markdown listing the top-N unused and transitive-leak findings per ingest.

prior_art.name: dependency-analysis-gradle-plugin (autonomousapps)
prior_art.description: Primary tool for Gradle declared-vs-used analysis. Bytecode-level analysis for JVM/Android Kotlin. Provides projectHealth task and fixDependencies auto-remediation. v3.7.0 adds Java 25 / ASM 9.9 support. Known KMP issues: Issue #1345 (doesn't recognise KMP project deps), Issue #1649 (KMP androidMain config crash). MIT license.

prior_art.name: gradle-dependency-analyze
prior_art.description: Gradle plugin checking compile-scope declared vs used classes. Older, complementary to DAGP. MIT license.

prior_art.name: spmgraph (GetYourGuide)
prior_art.description: SPM dependency graph management tool with rule-based assertions via SPMGraphConfig.swift. Updated Nov 2025.

prior_art.name: swift-dependency-graph (Tim Searle)
prior_art.description: Builds dependency graph across Xcode targets and SwiftPM packages, exports to HTML, DOT, JSON. Published Dec 2025.

prior_art.name: OWASP dependency-check (Swift analyzer)
prior_art.description: CVE-enriched dependency analysis for Swift/SPM packages. Adds security dimension to dependency surface.

prior_art.name: Gradle built-in dependency tasks
prior_art.description: gradle dependencies, gradle dependencyInsight, IntelliJ IDEA dependency diagram. Baseline tooling, less structured output for programmatic ingestion.

prior_art.name: Kotlin binary-compatibility-validator (KLib ABI)
prior_art.description: Generates .api dump files; KLib ABI support added 2024. Useful for tracking which declared dependency versions affect the public API surface.

graphiti_episode_type: EntityNode — :Dependency nodes are semi-permanent (carry end_time when removed from manifest); :DECLARES_DEP edges are versioned (new edge on version bump, old edge gets end_time). :DepFinding nodes are EpisodicNodes that expire when finding is resolved. :DepHealthReport is a point-in-time EpisodicNode.
ingest_perf_est: [uncertain] DAGP full projectHealth run on 20-module Android KMP repo: ~3–10 minutes. SPM Package.resolved parsing: <30 seconds. Tree-sitter import extraction (Kotlin + Swift): ~2–5 minutes. Total full ingest: ~5–15 minutes. Incremental (single module change): ~1–3 minutes. KMP-specific limitations (Issue #1345, #1649) may cause partial failures. Analogical estimates.
failure_modes: DAGP does not reliably recognise KMP commonMain/androidMain/iosMain source-set dependencies (Issue #1345)
DAGP crash (Issue #1649) on androidMainImplementation config in KMP projects with AGP 9.0+
SPM Package.resolved only tracks resolved (pinned) versions, not range constraints
Tree-sitter import extraction may over-count: a Kotlin file may import a symbol from a transitive dependency without that being a 'leak' in all build-system conventions
npm/package.json analysis not applicable for Unstoppable Wallet (Kotlin+Swift only)
open_questions: KMP DAGP issues (#1345, #1649): implement workaround or wait for upstream fix?
Overlap with Item 39 (Cross-Repo Dependency Version Skew Extractor): Items 5 and 39 share :Dependency nodes. Co-design or reconcile via MERGE?
How should version ranges ('>= 1.2.0, < 2.0.0' in SPM) be represented — single node with range attribute, or resolved-version node linked to range-constraint node?
Should DepFindings trigger immediate notifications or be batch-reviewed?
For crypto domain: some dependencies are deliberately pinned for reproducibility — how to distinguish intentional exact pins from accidental stale pins?
adversarial_resistance: high — manifest files and import statements are structured text with well-defined schemas. Not subject to obfuscation.
